reviews.review_title: Mixed Reality is broken barely playble😞
reviews.review_description:
Please help, I really want to play this!

* Mixed Reality is not positioned correctly and I dont know how to fix it. My exact room setup works In other MR games.

* VR mode is the only other option to play but THERE IS NO MOVEMENT SYSTEM! No teleport or walking 😭 making spotting anomalies harder for no reason I really want to look at the details and be able to walk closer.


Love this game concept and wanna recommend this to friends but I just can't its not playable.
Hope this review finds you well and game will be fixed 🙏🏼
Looking forward to update my review.

Unfortunately I couldn't get past the initial room setup, after that I'm told to take a pill,  but the vr hands aren't anywhere near my actual hands, so I can't take it. I go into the menu and there aren't any options to fix this. Can't say any more really,  very disappointing.

I know that MR is in the title, but I was not expecting it =D

It was a glad surprise when my room became the escape room and everything blended so well. Spend some time just checking the virtual shadows vs the real ones. Wont spoil the game, but it is very interesting.
I love You got me one good time.I'm not going to say I'm not going to spoil it.But you don't know when I get you

reviews.review_title: chilling experience in the best way!
reviews.review_description: I absolutely ADORE these kind of games, its one of my favorites for horror experiences! I played it at night all alone and I was scared trying to antecipate what would appear in the room HAHAHAHAHA it was such a fun experience! I loved it and absolutely recommend getting this game.
